summary: Completed testing of TemaDom extended price calculator with 28 categories and project image upload functionality (up to 10 images)
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints functioning correctly (40/42 tests passed)
Project creation with images array support working
Project detail endpoint returns images array correctly
Price Calculator displays all 28 categories including excavation (изкопни работи)
Calculator includes all required categories: excavation, foundations, roofing, windows/doors, drywall, render, sewage, fencing, paving, prefab, carpentry, waterproofing, heating, aircon, pools
Calculator price computation works correctly with regional variations
Calculator quality levels (economy, standard, premium) functioning
Calculator pricing types (labor-only vs labor+materials) working
Project creation form has image upload section with 'Снимки на проекта (до 10)' text
Project creation form accepts up to 10 images as specified
Project detail page displays image gallery when images exist
Image gallery shows main image with navigation arrows (‹ ›)
Thumbnail navigation works for switching between images
Image lightbox modal opens when clicking on main image
Lightbox modal can be closed properly
Project lists show image count information ('2 снимки')
User authentication and login flows working for both clients and companies

success_percentage.backend: 95% (40/42 tests passed - only expected registration failures due to existing test users)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all tested features working correctly including extended calculator and image functionality)
